blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where a customer accidentally posts data to the wrong business. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or results from this simulation, nor does it confirm whether the scenario behavior is supported or leads to a clear failure report. Without concrete evidence of the scenario's execution and its results, the validation remains inconclusive.
